data.name: Gallery Collector
data.detailed_description:
You got a phone, a dream, and a crippling need for validation. Let's go viral.

This is the influencer life, distilled into a clicker game. Rack up followers, get that ad revenue, and spend it on everything from phone gimbals to a literal brand empire.

The Goal? Buy the "Internet Immortality" upgrade before you die of cringe or go bankrupt. Your time is being tracked. Don't suck.

Here’s the "Content Creation" Loop:

  • CLICK for followers.

  • SPEND on items, businesses and upgrades. Or in casino, you know what to do...

  • GAMBLE in the casino because you have a problem. Hit the spin for a chance at insanely increasing fee later on and exclusive photos you can't get anywhere else. You probably can not collect all photos from the casino with just one run, deal with it. Oh by the way, the items collected from spins will exceed and stack up over the allowed limits of that item ;).

  • CHAT with potential "collabs." Pick your responses carefully... or just try to make them block you.

  • PERMADEATH if you lose the run, you lose the run. There is no saving other than the photos you already collected.

WARNING: This game contains:

  • Speedrun Mechanics: Your final time is everything. Optimize your route or, well... finish the game slower.

  • Strategic Consequences: If you just buy everything you see, you probably end up with 0 followers and 0 money and then lose the run. Think before you purchase.

  • NSFW Content: Flirty DMs and selfies and stuff. And of course rare photos from the casino. You know what you signed up for.

Can you build a legacy, or will you be just another forgotten meme?

data.short_description: Go from zero to hero (and back to zero again) in this influencer clicker sim! Chat up girls, blow your cash on spins, and try not to blow it up on your quest for Internet Immortality. How fast can you win?
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
